Who is this for: Office workers, administrative assistants, project managers, team leads, executives, knowledge workers, anyone using Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace
Team or Dept this is for: IT, Legal, Compliance, Human Resources, Operations, Risk Management
Description: Risks embedded in office tools, email assistants, and productivity platforms.
Prerequisites: Learners should have basic familiarity with everyday workplace tools such as email clients, word processors, and collaboration platforms like Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace, but no prior knowledge of artificial intelligence is required.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the AI features embedded in common office tools, email assistants, and productivity platforms, and explain the data privacy and security risks these features may introduce in a corporate environment. You will also be able to apply practical strategies to assess and manage your organisation's exposure to these hidden AI risks, helping you make more informed decisions about the everyday tools your team relies on.
